3 the glory of God. And there was a great sound, as thunder. And I said, Lord, what is this sound Ὁ
trumpet (Heb. chatsotserah) from chatsar "to sound a trumpet"

face of him that sitteth on the throne. This expression is a reference to God the Father

13. The light which is in all things, which giveth life to all
 things, which is the law by which all things are governed, even the
 power of God who sitteth upon his throne, who is in the bosom of
 eternity, who is in the midst of all things.
